articles.title: Brent crude briefly tops $119 per barrel, before receding, and shakes stock markets worldwide
articles.description:
Uncertainty about what will happen in the war has led to manic back-and-forth swings in the oil and stock markets since the war began nearly three weeks ago.

The post Brent crude briefly tops $119 per barrel, before receding, and shakes stock markets worldwide appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Brent crude oil prices peaked at $119 per barrel, causing market volatility.
Stock markets worldwide experienced significant fluctuations due to ongoing war uncertainty.
Boston residents may face higher fuel prices and increased cost of living.

articles.title: The Bruins’ second line isn’t just a pleasant surprise. They’ve been one of the NHL’s best this year.
articles.description:
“We’re never happy with a shift. We just want to be better and better."

The post The Bruins’ second line isn’t just a pleasant surprise. They’ve been one of the NHL’s best this year. appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: The Bruins' second line ranks among the NHL's best this season.
Viktor Arvidsson, Pavel Zacha, and Casey Mittelstadt lead the charge.
Their performance boosts Boston's playoff hopes as the season progresses.
